testcase.name: tests.test_auth
testcase.error: tests/test_auth.py:3: in <module> from api.dates import naive_utcnow api/__init__.py:169: in <module> from api.app import create_app, db, ma # noqa: F401 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ api/app.py:7: in <module> from config import Config config.py:13: in <module> class Config: config.py:15: in Config ALCHEMICAL_DATABASE_URL = settings.DATABASE_URL or \ ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/dynaconf/base.py:144: in __getattr__ value = getattr(self._wrapped, name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/dynaconf/base.py:325: in __getattribute__ return super().__getattribute__(name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Settings' object has no attribute 'DATABASE_URL'
